texto: An ancient mustiness padded the air, tinged with with an acrid scent-a trace of the war between paper and oxygen, played out in slow inexorable burn that would one day crumble this empire to dust." -page 62

texto: Right, then.” He pointed across to a bank of phones against the wall. “If you want to check your voice mail, now’s the time.”“Where’s my phone?”“Out of service.”“It was fine in the car.”“It’s not fine now.”“What’d you do to it?”“Put it out of our misery. I’m sorry, Kate. But every minute it’s on, you’re traceable to within the length of a football field, anywhere on the planet.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jennifer Lee Carrell que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Right, then.” He pointed across to a bank of phones against the wall. “If you want to check your …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humour, right, com foco em reflexao.

I’m sorry, Kate. But every minute it’s on, you’re traceable to within the length of a football field, anywhere on the planet.
